homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track is an upbeat and energetic electronic dance song driven by a strong four-on-the-floor beat. A female vocalist sings in a foreign language, creating an exotic atmosphere over the repetitive synth melody and bassline. The fast tempo and club-oriented style make it ideal for a dance party setting.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.caption: This instrumental track delivers a powerful and aggressive atmosphere driven by intense electric guitars, bass, and fast-paced drums. The heavy metal sound creates an energetic vibe that feels perfect for high-stakes action sequences or video game boss battles.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment serves as a perfect example of ambient music, featuring ethereal and atmospheric soundscapes that create a profound sense of space and tranquility. The instrumental composition relies heavily on synthesizers to build a dreamy and calming environment ideal for relaxation or meditation. With no vocals present, the listener can fully immerse themselves in the peaceful mood without distraction.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features an instrumental piece dominated by the steady, mechanical drone of a car engine idling in place. The sound creates a dark and ominous atmosphere filled with tension, fitting for a cinematic scene depicting a vehicle starting up. While other field recordings from the same collection capture ambient street life like passing planes and crows, this specific clip isolates the hypnotic rhythm of the engine.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
